title: senecio fluminensis
intro: Senecio fluminensis, also known as River Dusty Miller or Rio de Janeiro Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential treatment for infections and wounds. The health benefits of Senecio fluminensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it has also been used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
